name: io.github.Harusame64/desktop-touch-mcp
description: Computer-use MCP server for Windows 10/11. Lets Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client take screenshots, read UI Automation trees, drive Chrome via CDP, type / click / scroll, and run terminal commands — with semantic discover-then-act targeting and per-action perception guards that beat raw pixel-coordinate guessing. 28 tools, npx install.

environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_AUTO_GUARD
environmentVariables.description: Set to '0' to disable automatic action guards (reverts to v0.11.12 behavior).

environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_PERCEPTION_RESOURCES
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable MCP perception resources (perception://target/.../timeline etc.).
